prompt: Mock up a horror movie database website with dark gothic themes, blood-red accents, flickering text effects, vintage movie poster galleries, and spine-chilling sound wave visualizations
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed screenshot of a horror movie database website user interface. The design is predominantly dark gothic, utilizing deep blacks, charcoal grays, and weathered textures, accented by subtle blood-red elements for highlights and interactive features. The main website title, located at the top of the screen, exhibits a subtle flickering or glitching text effect, suggesting instability. A large central section features a grid-based gallery showcasing various vintage horror movie posters, each with a distressed and aged appearance. Below the poster gallery, or integrated into individual movie details, include a visual representation of a jagged, dark, and unsettling sound wave visualization, subtly highlighted with red.
objects: main website title (at the top of the screen)
flickering or glitching text effect on the main website title
vintage horror movie posters (multiple, within the gallery)
distressed and aged appearance on movie posters
jagged, dark, unsettling sound wave visualization
subtle red highlights on the sound wave visualization
deep blacks and charcoal grays (predominant UI colors)
subtle blood-red elements (for UI highlights and interactive features)
